Breast Cancer Wisconsin.source: scikit-learn load_breast_cancer (UCI Wisconsin Diagnostic Breast Cancer)
Breast Cancer Wisconsin.description: Binary malignant/benign diagnosis data with 30 continuous features.
Breast Cancer Wisconsin.preprocessing: Numeric median imputation and standard scaling fitted on training rows only.

Adult Income.description: Binary income classification with six numeric and eight categorical raw features.
Adult Income.selection_rule: All 32,561 training and 16,281 test records combined; no rows dropped.
Adult Income.preprocessing: Training-only numeric median imputation and scaling; training-only categorical mode imputation and one-hot encoding; unseen categories map to all-zero indicator groups.

Covertype.description: Seven-class forest cover type classification with 54 numeric/binary features.
Covertype.selection_rule: Seed 42 exact largest-remainder stratified sample of 50,000 from all 581,012 rows.
Covertype.preprocessing: Numeric median imputation and standard scaling fitted on training rows only.

MNIST2Class.description: Binary handwritten digit classification using all MNIST zeros and ones.
MNIST2Class.selection_rule: All 6,903 zeros and all 7,877 ones; no sampling.
MNIST2Class.preprocessing: Numeric median imputation and standard scaling fitted on training rows only.
